subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! According to the indications and glad tidings of the honored handmaidens of God, a noble offspring hath been bestowed upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از قرار اشارات و بشارات حضرات نسوان خدا بشما نجل نجیبی عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @naming of children; of individuals
